name: helpdesk
description: Full-stack helpdesk application with Express.js, React, TypeScript, and Bun

scripts.dev: bun run --cwd ./server dev & bun run --cwd ./client dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd ./server build && bun run --cwd ./client build
scripts.type-check: bun run --cwd ./server type-check && bun run --cwd ./client type-check
